name: Secureworks Taegis XDR
description: Integrates with Secureworks Taegis XDR GraphQL and REST APIs for alert management, endpoint asset visibility, investigation queries, and countermeasure deployment

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve alerts from Taegis XDR with filtering by severity, status, and time range

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query for alerts (e.g., allAlerts with filters)

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: JSON object of GraphQL query variables for filtering

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific alert by ID

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert

actions.name: Update Alert
actions.description: Update the status, assignee, or resolution of an alert

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert to update

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New alert status: open, suppressed, inProgress, closed

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Resolution type for closed alerts: truePositive, falsePositive, notActionable

actions.name: List Investigations
actions.description: Retrieve the list of investigations created in Taegis XDR

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query for investigations

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: JSON object of query variables

actions.name: Create Investigation
actions.description: Create a new investigation and optionally associate alerts

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Title of the investigation

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of the investigation

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Investigation priority: critical, high, medium, low

parameters.name: alert_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of alert IDs to associate with the investigation

actions.name: List Endpoint Assets
actions.description: Retrieve endpoint assets monitored by the Taegis agent

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL query for endpoint assets

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: JSON object of query variables for filtering

actions.name: Isolate Endpoint
actions.description: Isolate an endpoint from the network using Taegis agent countermeasure

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the endpoint to isolate

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Reason for isolating the endpoint

actions.name: Release Endpoint
actions.description: Remove network isolation from a previously isolated endpoint

parameters.name: endpoint_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the endpoint to release

actions.name: Run Threat Hunting Query
actions.description: Execute a custom threat hunting query against Taegis XDR data lake using QL2 query language

parameters.name: query_string
parameters.description: The QL2 hunt query to execute

parameters.name: from_time
parameters.description: Start time for the query window (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: to_time
parameters.description: End time for the query window (ISO 8601)
